LightningComponentBundle.description: Global site footer with GBTA branding, three configurable navigation columns, social links, and language selector

property.name: column1MenuName
property.label: Column 1: Navigation Menu
property.description: Navigation menu for the first footer column (e.g. Our Company)

property.name: column2MenuName
property.label: Column 2: Navigation Menu
property.description: Navigation menu for the second footer column (e.g. Get Help)

property.name: column3MenuName
property.label: Column 3: Navigation Menu
property.description: Navigation menu for the third footer column (e.g. Account)

property.name: helpButtonPageApiName
property.label: Help Button Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name the help button navigates to

property.name: languageLabel
property.label: Language / Region Label
property.description: Text for the language selector button (e.g. 'United States | EN'). Leave blank to hide.

property.name: languagePageApiName
property.label: Language Page API Name
property.description: Experience Cloud page API name for the language selector

property.name: twitterUrl
property.label: X (Twitter) URL
property.description: Full URL for the X/Twitter profile. Leave blank to hide the icon.

property.name: facebookUrl
property.label: Facebook URL
property.description: Full URL for the Facebook page. Leave blank to hide the icon.

property.name: youtubeUrl
property.label: YouTube URL
property.description: Full URL for the YouTube channel. Leave blank to hide the icon.

property.name: instagramUrl
property.label: Instagram URL
property.description: Full URL for the Instagram profile. Leave blank to hide the icon.

property.name: footerLogoUrl
property.label: Footer Logo URL
property.description: URL of the logo image shown in the footer bottom bar. Leave blank to show GBTA text fallback.

property.name: copyrightText
property.label: Copyright / Tagline Text
property.description: Optional tagline or copyright text shown next to the footer logo (e.g. 'Global Business Travel Association')
